role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within the domain of script analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues appropriate for the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Phragmites) and their biogeographical relevance.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed road width, paving materials, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural styles and cross-domain features to distinguish candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their roles, provided concrete evidence, and the tournament correctly synthesized this into the right answer.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain and reeds match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identification of reeds and grass types is consistent with the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of road width and brick paving are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of roof styles and house materials are accurate.
